optimization_analysis.optimized_query:
# Optimized Federated Query using SERVICE clauses
# Each triple pattern is pushed to its most selective endpoint

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8897/sparql/
# Predicates: 1
#   <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#sameAs> (http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Concept -> http://www.geonames.org/ontology#Feature) [1.8K triples]

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8895/sparql/
# Predicates: 3
#   <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#sameAs> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Reaction -> http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Reaction) [7.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#sameAs> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Drug -> http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Drug) [7.4K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#sameAs> (http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Compound -> http://bio2rdf.org/ns/kegg#Compound) [13.9K triples]

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8892/sparql/
# Predicates: 5
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/interactionDrug2> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drug_interactions -> http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drugs) [10.1K triples]
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/interactionDrug2> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drug_interactions -> http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/vocab/resource/class/Offer) [10.1K triples]
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/text> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drug_interactions -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [10.1K triples]
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/interactionDrug1> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drug_interactions -> http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/vocab/resource/class/Offer) [10.1K triples]
#   <http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/interactionDrug1> (http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drug_interactions -> http://www4.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/drugbank/resource/drugbank/drugs) [10.1K triples]
